mano_cua.result_summary: 多个键盘导航bug。Bug1: 右方向键从April 15跳到April 25(today)而非April 16。Bug2: 左方向键首次按下无视觉响应。Bug3: 下方向键从April 17跳到April 25(today)而非April 24。Bug4: 右方向键从April 12直接跳到May月视图。Bug5: Page Up/Down键无效果不能切换月份。Bug6: Enter键不能确认选择日期。控制台未发现ReferenceError但键盘交互严重异常。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Multiple keyboard navigation bugs: arrow keys jump to today instead of adjacent dates, Page Up/Down don't switch months, Enter doesn't select dates.

deploy_notes: commit cd3ce229c4. Angular ng serve on port 4200. dart-sass shim for node-sass.
